title: Poland buys V-Bat UAVs from Shield AI for naval forces
description: In Ukraine, V-Bat drones have withstood electronic warfare attacks that have downed other UAVs.

title: After betting the firm on Anthropic, Menlo Ventures raises victorious $3B fund
description: Menlo has created a solid rep for itself as an AI investor, all based on one gutsy $750 million move in 2024.

title: Vention collaborates with FANUC and Universal Robots on software-defined automation
description:
Vention is working with partners to make design and deployment of industrial and collaborative robots easier for manufacturers.

title: Anthropic Backer Menlo Ventures Raises $3B In New Funds To Back AI Startups Across Stages
description: Venture firm Menlo Ventures has raised $3 billion across two new funds, the largest capital raise in its 50-year history, to invest in AI startups from seed through growth stage. The firm says the new capital will target companies in sectors from enterprise tools to healthcare.

title: SpaceX Starfall and Future Human-rated Versions
description: Starfall is SpaceX’s new uncrewed disk-shaped cargo return capsule (launched on its first demo flight today, June 23, 2026, aboard a Falcon 9). title: SpaceX Has Successful Starfall Demo
description: Today SpaceX deployed and demonstrated the Starfall low cost capsule return system. This a demo of a new vehicle that will enable affordable, routine access to the microgravity environment for scientific research and in-space manufacturing. title: Anthropic’s Claude Tag is learning your company, one Slack message at a time
description: Anthropic’s new Claude Tag brings an always-on AI teammate to Slack. But beyond productivity, the feature is a strategic play to capture organizational context, institutional knowledge, and enterprise workflows.

title: XAI and Cursor Strategy to Catch Up and Beat Anthropic in Coding
description: Cursor is training its own Opus-class model from scratch. They are no longer fine-tuned on open-source model like Kimi K2. This is a major step up in capability and independence. title: OpenAI launches new initiative to help find and patch open source bugs
description: OpenAI is using AI to help the open source community better protect itself.

title: Bear Robotics acquires Kinisi Robotics to boost its physical AI capabilities
description:

description:

title: Sea Limited, OpenAI to jointly expand AI access for e-commerce Shopee users, sellers
description: Singapore-headquartered e-commerce and gaming giant Sea Ltd and OpenAI willl collaborate to drive AI adoption across Southeast Asia and Brazil, focusing on AI-powered e-commerce.

title: Defense manufacturing readiness hinges on autonomous finishing, says GrayMatter Robotics
description:

description: One previously unreported SpaceX investor has ties to Chinese military contractors. The information was revealed only after ProPublica went to court to obtain it.

description:

description: Waymo has tapped fleet management company Element to help keep its robotaxis charged, maintained, and on the road as the company expands into more cities.

title: Contriving Imaginary Gaps in Nuclear Deterrence
description: Among some nuclear strategists, military officers, and lawmakers, a belief bordering on the canonical has taken root that the United States is on the short end of a “deterrence gap” with Russia and China. title: When Refusal Doesn’t Matter: Operation Epic Fury and the Erosion of Host Nation Consent
description: When the U.S. military launched its war against Iran in Feb. 2026, it did not just dismantle Iranian military capabilities. It shattered the illusion that the United States would consult with its closest allies and that an ally’s refusal to grant base access can stop an American war in motion.

title: Definium’s LSD formula produces ‘best data ever seen’ in a pivotal depression trial, CEO says
